message:
chore(gitignore): exclude bv (beads viewer) local config directory

Add `.bv/` to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits of beads viewer
local configuration and cache files.

The beads viewer (bv) is a TUI companion tool for the beads issue tracker
(bd) used by this project for task tracking. When bv is run, it creates
a `.bv/` directory containing:
- User-specific TUI configuration (colors, keybindings, layout prefs)
- Local caches for faster startup and navigation
- Session state that varies between developers

This directory is analogous to other local tool directories already
excluded (like `.beads/` which has its own nested .gitignore). Since
bv config is developer-specific and not relevant to the project's
source code or build artifacts, it should not be version controlled.

This follows the existing pattern in this project of excluding local
tooling directories (`.venv/`, `.beads/`, IDE configs, etc.) while
keeping the repository focused on source code and project documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -224,3 +224,6 @@ test_report_*
 test-outputs/
 
 ops/warnings.jsonl
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
